expectations.evidence: Lines 112-160: approveTokenIfNeeded function with allowance check
Lines 187-199: All fields present including claimBounty, priceIndex, rawAmount=500n, postOnly=true, baseAmount=0n

Missing: (1) No market info fetch - uses hardcoded placeholder QUOTE_TOKEN_ADDRESS=0x0000...0000, (2) Approve amount is RAW_AMOUNT*10_000n (wrong formula - should be rawAmount*quoteUnit), (3) No order status polling after placement, (4) No postOnly safety check
